sql_array: CREATE TABLE sample_text (original_text VARCHAR, padded_text VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO sample_text (original_text, padded_text) VALUES ('hello', lpad('hello', 8, '>'));
UPDATE sample_text SET padded_text = lpad(original_text, 10, '*') WHERE original_text = 'hello';
SELECT original_text, padded_text FROM sample_text WHERE padded_text = lpad(original_text, 10, '<');
DELETE FROM sample_text WHERE padded_text = lpad(original_text, 12, '#') AND original_text = 'hello';
